title: Great reporting dashboard
review_text: The reporting dashboard made weekly executive updates much faster and easier to share.

title: Solid automation
review_text: Automation rules reduced manual follow-ups and helped our team respond on time.

title: Needs better search
review_text: Search works but advanced filters are hard to discover for new team members.

title: Fast onboarding
review_text: Setup took less than a day and onboarding docs were clear for non-technical users.

title: UI can feel crowded
review_text: Too many controls are visible at once, but the core workflows are still reliable.
